description_long: This house features a compact, rectangular footprint with a red gable roof and beige exterior walls, set on a large green lawn. The structure includes two visible stories, with the upper level slightly offset, creating a stepped profile. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of small and medium-sized rectangular panes distributed across the facade. The main entryway is defined by a small overhang and a short set of steps, leading to a modest front door. A side extension, possibly a garage or utility room, projects from one side of the house, adding functional space. The overall design suggests a practical, suburban residential home with Mediterranean influences.
description: A two-story beige house with a red gable roof, asymmetrical windows, and a small entryway, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, overhang, and a clear view of the red gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stepped two-story profile and the side extension.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, side extension, and window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the offset upper story and additional windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Small overhang above the main door with a short set of steps and minimal decorative elements.
